walking_score_percentile_policy: Walking-score percentiles (H2 dwell rule) are computed at runtime per fleet from the fleet's own NF trucks. This file records that policy — it does NOT store pre-computed percentile values, because those change as new trucks are observed. The envelope_json stores the static end-rule reference; the runtime weekly job computes rolling score percentiles against the live NF distribution.
immature_truck_policy: Trucks with <12 weeks of history are excluded from persistence scoring (insufficient history for the 12-week trailing window). They are flagged as 'immature' and scored only on Layer-1 risk tier. This policy is ACTIVE BY DEFAULT for all new trucks.
no_transfer_warning: These baseline values are fleet-specific. Do NOT copy them to another fleet. Regulation setpoints differ (27.6–28.2 V documented range). Run fleet_onboarding.py on the target fleet's own NF caches.
